behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Association Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Association properties that represent a discrete aspect of the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyReferenceDataDirectoryEntryInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: AssociationInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: EmployeeReference
attributes.description: Reference to the employee party involved in the association.

attributes.name: AssociateReference
attributes.description: Reference to the counterparty involved in the association.

attributes.name: AssociateType
attributes.description: Classification of the relationship between two parties.

attributes.name: ProductInstanceReference
attributes.description: Reference to the product agreement associated with the relationship.

attributes.name: ProductInstanceInvolvementReference
attributes.description: Reference to the involvement of a party in a product agreement.

attributes.name: AssociateObligationorDependencyDescription
attributes.description: Description of obligations or dependencies between associated parties.

attributes.name: AssociationValidFromToDate
attributes.description: Time period during which the association is valid.

attributes.name: PreferredBeneficiary
attributes.description: Reference to a preferred beneficiary party in the relationship.

attributes.name: ProxyorRepresentativeorPowerofAttorneyReference
attributes.description: Reference to a party relationship representing delegated authority.

attributes.name: PrimaryPartyReference
attributes.description: Reference to the main party initiating or owning the association.

attributes.name: AssociationStatus
attributes.description: Current state of the association (active, inactive, suspended).

attributes.name: AssociationIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the association record.

attributes.name: AssociationRole
attributes.description: Specifies the role played by each party in the association.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Reference Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Reference properties that represent a discrete aspect of the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyReferenceDataDirectoryEntryInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance.

attributes.name: ReferenceInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier assigned to the specific reference instance record within the system for tracking and retrieval purposes.

attributes.name: PartyLegalEntityReference
attributes.description: Reference to the legally recognized entity participating in the business interaction.

attributes.name: PartySalutation
attributes.description: Title or form of address used to formally identify the party, such as Mr, Ms, or Dr.

attributes.name: PartyFullLegalName
attributes.description:
Official registered name of the party as recognized by legal or regulatory authorities.

OR

The full legal name of the party. (UK Open Banking)

attributes.name: PartyLegalStructure
attributes.description:
Classification of the legal form of the party, such as individual, partnership, or corporation.

OR

Legal standing of the party. (UK Open Banking)

attributes.name: PartyAddress
attributes.description:
Primary postal address associated with the party for communication and official correspondence.

OR

Postal address of a party. (UK Open Banking)

attributes.name: PartyCountryOfResidence
attributes.description:
Country in which the party is legally recognized as a resident for regulatory or tax purposes.

OR

Country in which a person resides (the place of a person's home). In the case of a company, it is the country from which the affairs of that company are directed. (ISO20022 BM)

attributes.name: GovernmentIssuedIdentityReference
attributes.description: Reference to unique identifier issued by a government authority to verify the identity of the party. (e.g. social security number)

attributes.name: GovernmentIssuedDocumentDetails
attributes.description: Details of official documents provided by the party for identification or verification purposes, extracted from government issued documents (e.g. driving license/passport details)

attributes.name: DocumentDirectoryEntryInstanceReference
attributes.description: Reference to a stored document record within the document management system associated with the party.

attributes.name: ResidencyStatus
attributes.description: Indicates the residency classification of the party, such as resident or non-resident.

attributes.name: DateofBirth
attributes.description: Date on which the individual party was born, used for identification and verification.

attributes.name: Nationality
attributes.description: Country of citizenship associated with the party.

attributes.name: ResidentialAddress
attributes.description: Address where the party resides, typically used for personal contact and verification.

attributes.name: EmailAddress
attributes.description: Electronic mail address used to communicate with the party.

attributes.name: PhoneNumber
attributes.description: Contact number used to communicate with the party.

attributes.name: SocialNetworkContacts
attributes.description: References to the partys social or digital communication channels, if maintained.

attributes.name: PoliticalExposureType
attributes.description: Classification indicating whether the party is a politically exposed person (PEP) or related entity.

attributes.name: PoliticalExposureDescription
attributes.description: Additional descriptive information detailing the nature of the partys political exposure.

attributes.name: CorporateCustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the corporate entity associated with the party in a business relationship.

attributes.name: CorporateCustomerLegalEntityReference
attributes.description: Reference to the legal entity representing the corporate customer.

attributes.name: CorporateAddress
attributes.description: Official address of the corporate entity associated with the party.

attributes.name: CompanyOfficerReference
attributes.description: Reference to an individual acting as an officer or representative of an organisation.

attributes.name: CompanyOfficerRole
attributes.description: Specifies the role performed by the company officer within the organisation.

attributes.name: CustomerSinceDate
attributes.description: Date from which the party has been recognized as a customer of the institution.

attributes.name: PartyIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier assigned to a party to distinguish it within a system or across systems, including government-issued or institution-specific identification references.

attributes.name: PartyType
attributes.description: Classification of the party indicating whether it is a person, organisation, or other entity type involved in the business interaction.

attributes.name: PartyProfileReference
attributes.description: Reference to the profile information associated with the party, including risk classification, KYC details, and compliance-related attributes.

attributes.name: PartyActivityIndicator
attributes.description: Identifies the primary business activity or industry classification associated with the party, typically used for regulatory or analytical purposes.

attributes.name: PartyDocumentReference
attributes.description: Reference to documents associated with the party, such as identification documents, certificates, or supporting records used for verification.

attributes.name: KYCStatus
attributes.description:
The status indicating the outcome of the customer identity verification and due diligence process performed to establish and validate the identity of a party in accordance with regulatory and institutional requirements.

Purpose: Confirms whether the institution has sufficient confidence in the customer's identity and supporting information to establish or maintain a business relationship.

Example:
Passed, Failed, Pending Verification, Expired, Refresh Required

attributes.name: AMLStatus
attributes.description:
The status indicating the outcome of anti-money laundering and sanctions screening activities performed to assess whether a party presents money laundering, terrorist financing, sanctions, or other financial crime risks.

Purpose: Determines whether the party can be onboarded, requires enhanced monitoring, or should be restricted based on financial crime risk assessment.

Example:
Passed, High Risk, Sanctions Match, Potential Match, Under Investigation, Rejected

attributes.name: PEPStatus
attributes.description:
The status indicating the outcome of screening a party against Politically Exposed Person (PEP) lists and related persons databases to determine whether enhanced due diligence measures are required.

Purpose: Identifies customers who may present elevated corruption, bribery, or reputational risks due to their current or former public functions or close associations.

Example: 
No Match, Confirmed PEP, Potential Match, Under Review, Cleared

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Bank Relation Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Bank Relation properties that represent a discrete aspect of the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyReferenceDataDirectoryEntryInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: BankRelationInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: BankRelation
attributes.description: Reference to the underlying relationship between the bank and the customer.

attributes.name: BankRelationType
attributes.description: Specifies the nature or classification of the bank-customer relationship.

attributes.name: BusinessUnitorEmployeeReference
attributes.description: Reference to the bank unit or employee responsible for managing the relationship.

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer involved in the banking relationship.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the financial institution providing services in the relationship.

attributes.name: RelationshipStatus
attributes.description: Indicates the current state of the relationship such as active, inactive, or closed.

attributes.name: RelationshipStartDate
attributes.description: Date on which the relationship between the customer and the bank was established.

attributes.name: RelationshipEndDate
attributes.description: Date on which the relationship ended or is expected to end.

attributes.name: PrimaryRelationshipIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this is the primary banking relationship for the customer.

attributes.name: RelationshipChannel
attributes.description: Specifies the primary channel through which the relationship is maintained (e.g., branch, digital, RM).

attributes.name: RelationshipCategory
attributes.description: Classifies the relationship into segments such as retail, corporate, or private banking.

attributes.name: RelationshipDescription
attributes.description: Additional descriptive information about the relationship for operational or servicing purposes.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Demographic Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Demographic properties that represent a discrete aspect of the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyReferenceDataDirectoryEntryInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: DemographicInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: Socio-EconomicClassification
attributes.description: Classification of the party based on income level, occupation, and social status used for segmentation and service eligibility.

attributes.name: EthnicityorReligion
attributes.description: Captures the ethnic background or religious affiliation of the individual for profiling and regulatory purposes.

attributes.name: Employment
attributes.description:
Reference to the employing organization or employment relationship of the party.

or

Reference to the customer's employer (company name)

attributes.name: EmploymentHistory
attributes.description: Historical record of employment including previous roles, employers, and tenure.

attributes.name: EducationHistory
attributes.description: Record of educational qualifications, institutions attended, and certifications obtained by the party.

attributes.name: ServicingConstraints
attributes.description: Conditions or limitations that affect how the party can be serviced (e.g., accessibility, legal, religious or compliance constraints).

attributes.name: MaritalStatus
attributes.description: Current marital status of the individual such as single, married, or divorced used for profiling and eligibility assessment.

attributes.name: ResidentialStatus
attributes.description: Indicates whether the individual is a resident, non-resident, or holds another residency classification relevant for regulatory purposes.

attributes.name: OccupationType
attributes.description: Specifies the type or category of occupation of the individual such as salaried, self-employed, or unemployed.

attributes.name: AnnualIncomeRange
attributes.description: Estimated annual income bracket of the individual used for segmentation and risk profiling.

attributes.name: DependentsCount
attributes.description: Number of dependents associated with the individual used for financial profiling and product suitability.

attributes.name: CustomerSegment
attributes.description: Classification of the party into predefined segments such as retail, high net worth, or corporate based on demographic and financial characteristics.
